name: Bank of America Financial Center
description_short: Bank of America Financial Center in Kensington, Philadelphia offering full-service banking with walk-up ATM, appointment-based advisory services, and 24/7 mobile banking access.
description_long:
Bank of America is a major national financial institution operating this full-service Financial Center location in the Kensington neighborhood of Philadelphia at 1841 E Allegheny Ave. The center serves as a local banking hub providing in-person services alongside digital banking options. The location has been specifically designed to accommodate a range of customer needs, from basic transactions to comprehensive financial planning consultations.

The Financial Center offers a comprehensive suite of banking services including appointment-based advisory consultations, notary services, commercial deposit acceptance, and non-customer check cashing. The walk-up ATM provides extended access to cardless withdrawals, deposits, credit card payments, and multilingual support in seven languages (English, Spanish, Chinese, Korean, French, Russian, and Portuguese). Customers can schedule in-person appointments with financial specialists who provide guidance on personal accounts, savings goals, retirement planning, homeownership, and business development.

This location distinguishes itself through extended operating hours (9 AM–4 PM weekdays, 9 AM–2 PM Saturday), appointment scheduling flexibility, and integration with Bank of America's robust mobile and online banking platform. The center emphasizes 24/7 digital access through smartphone and tablet apps featuring mobile check deposit, biometric security (fingerprint/Face ID), and customizable account alerts. The ATM infrastructure includes cardless and contactless payment options, reducing friction for customers without physical cards.

As a major national bank branch, this location provides stability and regulatory oversight but operates within the constraints of traditional banking hours and may involve longer wait times during peak periods. The emphasis on appointment-based specialist consultations differs from immediate teller service availability, potentially requiring advance planning for complex financial discussions. Customers seeking immediate assistance with routine transactions may find the walk-up ATM and mobile app more suitable than branch visits.
pros: Walk-up ATM available with cardless and contactless payment options
Extended hours: Monday–Friday 9 AM–4 PM, Saturday 9 AM–2 PM
Multilingual ATM support in seven languages including Spanish, Chinese, and Korean
Mobile banking app with mobile check deposit via photo and biometric security (fingerprint/Face ID)
Notary services available at the location
Accepts commercial deposits and non-customer check cashing
Free appointment scheduling with financial specialists for personalized advice
cons: Branch closed Sundays, limiting weekend banking to Saturday mornings only
Full financial advisor services require advance appointment scheduling rather than walk-in availability
ATM hours vary at this location, creating uncertainty for after-hours cardless access
As a large national bank, may have higher fees and less personalized service than credit unions
Limited accessibility information provided regarding ADA compliance or parking facilities
best_for: Philadelphia residents seeking full-service banking with specialist financial planning consultations
Small business owners needing commercial deposit services and business advisory support
Customers preferring multilingual banking support and cardless ATM transactions
Individuals wanting integrated mobile and in-person banking with appointment flexibility
diagnosis: This Bank of America location is best suited for Philadelphia-area customers seeking comprehensive banking services combined with specialist financial guidance, particularly small business owners and individuals planning major financial moves like home purchases or retirement. The primary caveat is that specialized advisory services require advance appointment scheduling, making the location less suitable for customers needing immediate teller assistance with routine transactions.
services: Walk-up ATM with cash withdrawals and deposits
Cardless ATM access via debit card or smartphone digital wallet
Mobile check deposit via smartphone photo
Financial specialist appointments for personal, homeownership, and business planning
Customizable account alerts via mobile app
Biometric security (fingerprint/Face ID) for mobile app access
Multilingual ATM instructions (English, Spanish, Chinese, Korean, French, Russian, Portuguese)
